responsibilities: Collaborate with game designers and developers to conceptualize and implement designs.
Assist in the creation of UI/UX assets.
Design and implement sound effects and music for games.
Work closely with game designers to achieve the desired audio experience.
Edit and enhance audio from various sources.
nice_to_have: Experience in audio software like Pro Tools or Logic Pro.
Understanding of game design and the role of sound in gameplay.
Portfolio with samples of previous work in audio.
